testcase.name: test_airports_returns_200_plus

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected >=200 airports, got 194 assert 194 >= 200 + where 194 = len([{'iata': 'DEL', 'city': 'Delhi', 'name': 'Indira Gandhi Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'BOM', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'name': 'Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'BLR', 'city': 'Bengaluru', 'name': 'Kempegowda Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'MAA', 'city': 'Chennai', 'name': 'Chennai Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'CCU', 'city': 'Kolkata', 'name': 'Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'HYD', 'city': 'Hyderabad', 'name': 'Rajiv Gandhi Intl', 'country': 'India'}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_aerovista.py:59: in test_airports_returns_200_plus assert len(data) >= 200, f"Expected >=200 airports, got {len(data)}" E AssertionError: Expected >=200 airports, got 194 E assert 194 >= 200 E + where 194 = len([{'iata': 'DEL', 'city': 'Delhi', 'name': 'Indira Gandhi Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'BOM', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'name': 'Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'BLR', 'city': 'Bengaluru', 'name': 'Kempegowda Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'MAA', 'city': 'Chennai', 'name': 'Chennai Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'CCU', 'city': 'Kolkata', 'name': 'Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Intl', 'country': 'India'}, {'iata': 'HYD', 'city': 'Hyderabad', 'name': 'Rajiv Gandhi Intl', 'country': 'India'}, ...])
